title: cleome coccinea
intro: Cleome coccinea, also known as the scarlet gilria or flameflower, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cleomaceae family. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing skin irritations. Cleome coccinea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in topical creams and ointments to leverage its medicinal properties.
